title: Planet Labs PBC Stock Forecast and Analyst Predictions
text: Analyst consensus rates Planet Labs PBC as a Strong Buy based on 8 buy ratings, 2 hold ratings and 0 sell ratings. The average price target for Planet Labs PBC is $35.00, based on 10 Wall Street analysts' 12-month price targets. Planet Labs PBC is forecast to grow earnings and revenue by 33.1% and 23.9% per annum respectively, with EPS expected to grow by 31.7% per annum. Recent analyst actions include Wedbush analyst Daniel Ives raising the firm's price target on Planet Labs to $50 from $40 and keeping an Outperform rating. Deutsche Bank raised the price target to $38 from $17. Morgan Stanley raised Planet Labs Target to $35. The company faces valuation risks as it trades at premium multiples.
